Self.Wiki: Defines parameters relating to the camera during backstabs, ripostes and guard breaks.

startTime.Wiki: The duration (in seconds) before this camera is applied.

frequencyTime.Wiki: The duration (in seconds) of the shake period after starting.

endTime.Wiki: The duration (in seconds) after which this camera ends.

fovY.Wiki: The field of view multiplier, after adjustment. 100 is no change.

distance.Wiki: The distance multiplier, after adjustment. 100 is no change.

frequencyNum.Wiki: The number of shakes during the shake period.

frequencyFovY.Wiki: The field of view multiplier, after adjustment during a shake. 100 is no change.

frequencyDistance.Wiki: The distance multiplier, after adjustment during a shake. 100 is no change.
